description:
MonoSQ Basic

Structure Factor:
Monodisperse hard-sphere structure factor evaluated with the template's calc_monodisperse_sq function. The implementation uses the Percus-Yevick approximation, so eff_r controls the effective hard-sphere size and vol_frac controls the strength of interparticle packing correlations.

Form Factor:
Weighted mixture of MD-derived SAXS component profiles loaded from the project scattering_components directory. Each component trace represents an averaged scattering profile for one recognized cluster class, and the component weights are combined before the structure-factor correction is applied.

Model Parameters:
w1, w2, ..., wN: Relative contribution of each MD-derived component profile to the total solute intensity.
solv_w: Solvent weight applied directly to the experimental solvent trace and constrained to the interval [0, 1].
offset: Additive baseline shift used to account for residual background or instrument offsets.
eff_r: Effective hard-sphere radius used inside the structure-factor calculation.
vol_frac: Hard-sphere volume fraction that sets the correlation strength in the Percus-Yevick structure factor.
scale: Multiplicative scale factor applied only to the solute scattering contribution.
